description: PullRequestGeneratorGitea defines connection info specific to Gitea.

api.description: The Gitea API URL to talk to. Required

insecure.description: Allow insecure tls, for self-signed certificates; default: false.

labels.description: Labels is used to filter the PRs that you want to target

owner.description: Gitea org or user to scan. Required.

repo.description: Gitea repo name to scan. Required.
